item.title: Tips & Tricks on how to properly Shitpost.
Bio
item.description: Hey! My name is Sourajit Karmakar. I am 18 years old and a Senior at DW Daniel HS. I have deep interest in hardware, software, and more importantly Android. I also love photography, cooking and music. I am an aspiring software developer. I’m a member and contributor at StatiXOS; a custom AOSP ROM. Nice to meet you! Sourajit Karmakar

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: I’m usually available in Telegram and in the StatiXOS Public Chat. You can checkout my LinkedIn profile right here. For anything else, you can email me.
